description.zh: 下午好，大兵。我给你安排了一个任务，我建议你一刻也不要拖延。你听说过海边的污水处理厂了吗？不，不是疗养院的那个，那是个水电站。我们说的是Cape Dalniy的那个。总之，污水厂区域的某个地方，停着一架米-8，甚至可能还能用。如果混蛋们都消失了，你就可以想办法开着它逃走了。我需要它，有很多原因：它的附近有一堆军用物资箱。我猜它们的主人在撤退时没能把它们全部带走。我不知道那是谁，也不知道为什么他撤离了直升机，但是我的消息说，那里面有数不尽的好东西。带上一个指示器，然后标记上那只大鸟，我的狗腿们会去处理的。任务很简单，但也很重要。你可以先走了。
description.en: Good afternoon, soldier. I've got a task for you, I advise you not to postpone it. You've heard about the water treatment plant at the coast? No, not the one at the health resort, that one is a power station. I'm talking about the one at Cape Dalniy. So, somewhere on the treatment plant's territory, there is a military MI-8, might even be working. If shit goes south in the city, you could try to start it and get the hell out of here. Anyway, I need it for different reasons: there's a gold mine of army supply crates next to it. I guess the owners didn't have time to load it all before leaving. I don't know who and why left that heli there, but my sources say that there's a craplot of valuable goods. Bring a signal marker and mark the bird, my people will deal with it after. The job is simple but important. Off you go then.
